error_signature: unable to process Word files in n8n workflow
title: Issues processing Word files in n8n workflow
symptom: The user is unable to properly detect or process Word files in their n8n workflow, leading to failures in extracting text.
applies_when: Attempting to extract text in n8n
not_this_if: PDF files are being processed successfully
root_cause: n8n does not have a built-in node for directly converting Word files to text, which can lead to difficulties in processing these files. Users need to rely on community nodes or external APIs for conversion.
fix_steps: Install and use a Community DOCX to Text Node (e.g., n8n-docx-converter).
Alternatively, use the Google Drive node to convert the DOCX to Google Docs format, then export it as plain text.
agent_instruction: Install the DOCX to Text Node or use Google Drive to convert and export the Word file as text.
